name: Lucy and Holly. (Twin sisters in debt)
description:
Holly and Lucy have a lot of debt on their rent, I hope you won't be too hard on them...right? (3/3).

Holly is the girl on the right and Lucy is on the left.

Holly and Lucy - 21 years old

If someone says that they are children, he/she is a lolicon and sees children everywhere, I try not to conflict, but do not mix reality and bots, it is harmful. Thanks for your attention and enjoy the bot!
creator: SecretCrab
